title: SPIKE-01 findings
description: The machine-verifiable record of the SPIKE-01 sourcing spike (SPIKE-01). attempts is the dead-end denominator (candidate products tried, including any abandoned). Each products entry records the per-product outcome, effort and whether it reached a publishable schema-valid record. deadEndRate must be consistent with attempts and the sourced count. rederived carries the PROVISIONAL n=3 re-derived corpus target and Tier A entry gate, which Phase 4 refines.

attempts.description: Number of candidate products attempted to land the trio (the dead-end denominator), including any abandoned as un-sourceable.

strictHistoricBarMet.description: How many products had at least one HISTORIC fact verified to the full corroborable standard (two distinct-lineage sources, at least one primary/archival). Recorded separately from sourced because reaching a publishable record is a weaker bar than the corroborable historic standard.

toolingBlockers.description: The tooling constraints that bounded the spike (for example the archival fetch route and retailer blocks), named so Phase 2 ingestion can solve them.

phase2GateRequirements.description: The requirements the Phase 2 automated verification gate must enforce, named by this manual dry-run.

products.description: One entry per product taken to a record. A dead-end candidate that was abandoned before encoding is counted in attempts and narrated in the findings, not listed here.

outcome.description: Plain-English outcome class for this product.

sourced.description: Whether the product reached a publishable schema-valid record.

effort.description: Recorded per-product effort (for example the rough number of research fetches and the limiting factor).

historicBarMet.description: Whether at least one historic fact met the full corroborable standard for this product.

deadEndRate.description: The fraction of attempted candidates that could not be taken to a publishable record. Consistent with attempts and the count of sourced products: (attempts - sourcedCount) / attempts.

rederived.description: The re-derived PROD-12 corpus target and Phase 4 Tier A entry gate, explicitly PROVISIONAL placeholders.

corpusTarget.description: Provisional re-derived launch-corpus target (PROD-12), down from the ~100 placeholder.

tierAEntryGate.description: Provisional re-derived count of products achievable to full then-vs-now Tier A under current tooling, down from the >=15 placeholder.

provisional.description: Always true: these are n=3 estimates Phase 4 refines, not commitments.

basis.description: The reasoning and per-product basis behind the re-derived figures.
